title: The Scene on the Table.
description: A complete, step-by-step walkthrough of how to take a stuck scene into an AI revision session — from the first brief to the final decision about what to keep.

title: When Your Character Stops Moving.
description: Every writer hits the wall where a character stops feeling like a person and starts feeling like a function. Five prompts to break them open again and out of cliché.

title: AI Has a Desk, Not a Filing Cabinet.
description: Every revision session with AI begins from scratch. Understanding the context window helps long-form writers design better, focused editing sessions.

title: Don't Let It Sand You Down.
description: AI feedback often pushes prose toward the statistical average—here's how to preserve the stylistic fingerprints that make your voice yours.

title: Talk to It Like an Editor.
description: Prompting and context engineering can turn generic AI feedback into precise, revision-ready editorial insight.

title: The Machine That Guesses — Brilliantly.
description: An AI doesn't know what it's going to say next—it predicts it. Understanding that one fact changes everything about how you work with these tools.

title: AI Doesn't Read. It Eats.
description: Before you hand your prose to an AI, there's one thing you need to know about how it actually reads your words.
